[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Kendra Tissido''' was captain of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Courier/Legends|courier]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] ''[[Quickwit]]''. Prior to the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], her ship was attacked by a [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] and five [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]] when its crew dropped out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] to recalibrate its [[Navigation computer/Legends|navcomputer]] settings in [[Ando system/Legends|Andoan space]]. She decided to withdraw, and the ''Quickwit'' took light damage. After the attack was declared an act of war by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Rasit Brun]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], [[Lott Dod/Legends|Lott Dod]] was quick to attempt to dissuade reports, calling Tissido a "frightened delivery girl".
